MAP.COMMENT: get repeat count and get period number for next period

RETRY.COMMENT: repeat on repeat count, calculate start, end, monitoring date and create periods list for insertion to db

BRANCH.COMMENT: get the start and end date based on type

MAP.COMMENT: calculate new start and new end date
calculate new start and new end date

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: ALTVE-196 --- POINTS or POSTLIMITPOINTS or EVENTS ---

MAP.COMMENT: --- If last period is not null map period target value into periodInput doc ---

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: map BRE target value to period input doc

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

MAP.COMMENT: -- Map to target points value column --

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
